ground_truth.title: Top Home Services Franchise Brands to Watch in 2026
ground_truth.author: Victoria Campisi
ground_truth.main_content: A snapshot of the home and property service franchises gaining traction as more buyers look for steady, needs-based businesses in the year ahead. Explore the top home services franchise brands gaining momentum in 2026. See which recurring-revenue models & essential service concepts are attracting franchise buyers. This brand is a paid partner of 1851 Franchise.
